stories.title: Search input with clear control
stories.i_want: a visible, focusable search input with a clear control
stories.so_that: I can start filtering and reset the list quickly
acceptance_criteria: Search input is visible above the replay list when the list is visible
Search input is keyboard-focusable and operable without a mouse
Clear control (or Escape) clears the query and restores the full list

stories.title: Real-time replay filtering by score and date
stories.i_want: the replay list to filter as I type
stories.so_that: I can quickly find specific games
acceptance_criteria: Filtering is client-side against in-memory replay data
Filtering matches score and date/timestamp fields
Filtering is case-insensitive and trims leading/trailing whitespace
Filtering begins from the first character entered
Input is debounced before applying the filter

stories.title: Empty state when no replays match
stories.i_want: a clear empty-state message when there are no matches
stories.so_that: I understand the list is filtered to zero results
acceptance_criteria: When the filtered result set is empty, the replay list area shows a message
The empty-state message is distinguishable from an empty replay history

stories.title: Reset search when starting a new game or leaving the replay list
stories.i_want: the search to reset when I start a new game or leave the replay list
stories.so_that: I return to the full list next time I view replays
acceptance_criteria: Starting a new game clears the search query and restores the full replay list
Navigating away from and back to the replay list view resets the search state
